title: RayvaxMod:More Ores
description: This mod mainly adds ores, tools and armors.
body:
This mod Add 16 ores on the world and 2 Alloys. All exept some have tools and armors with material. Some ores can be confused, because their colors are very close to each other in the color code for world ores, Nether and End ores will have for them, a more saturated color for their given a higher value , so harder to find. Netherite armor is still the best armor in the game, but it can be surpassed by modded armor in some details To keep a balance between Vanilla and this mod.

Beware, some ores are bad for making armor and tools. it's materials are more made for more technical thing which will be used in another mod which will be added as an extension of this mod with other functions.

Ores added with tools & armors:
-Aluminium
-Tin
-Chrome
-Nickel
-Plomb
-Silver
-Titanium
-Zinc

-Volcanite (Nether ore)
-Soulrite (Nether ore)
-Racknite (Nether ore)
-Enderite (End ore)

Ores added without tools & armors:
-Salt (Sodium)
-Lithium
-Arsenic
-Silicon




Alloy (Mix two minerals)
-Bronze
-Steel
-Toxic Bronze (named: Bronze)
